articles.title: IMD Issues Orange Alert for Thunderstorms, Gusty Winds in Nagaland, Manipur, Mizoram, Tripura - News On AIR
articles.search_term: ("heat advisory" OR "heat action plan" OR "heat alert" OR "IMD warning" OR "IMD alert" OR "red alert" OR "orange alert" OR "yellow alert" OR "NDMA advisory" OR "cooling shelter" OR "relief measures" OR "heat compensation" OR "severe weather warning") Manipur
articles.full_text:
India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued an orange alert for thunderstorms accompanied by lightning and gusty winds at isolated places over Nagaland, Manipur, Mizoram and Tripura tomorrow.
According to the IMD, similar weather conditions are likely to prevail over Jharkhand, Andhra Pradesh, Arunachal Pradesh, Assam, Meghalaya, Bihar, Chhattisgarh, Himachal Pradesh, Maharashtra, Odisha, Telangana, West Bengal and Sikkim during the next two days. The IMD has also predicted heavy rainfall over Arunachal Pradesh, Assam and Meghalaya tomorrow.
